description: Design the system architecture, signal both devs to start parallel work, wait for their completions, then assemble the final document

steps.content:
## System Architecture
Designed by architect.

Components:
- Backend API service (REST + WebSocket)
- Frontend SPA (React + TypeScript)
- Shared data layer (PostgreSQL + Redis cache)

Constraints:
- Backend must expose /api/v1/* endpoints
- Frontend must consume the API via typed client
- Both must agree on shared schema defined here

Schema:
  User { id: uuid, name: string, role: enum(admin,user) }
  Task { id: uuid, title: string, assignee: uuid, status: enum(todo,doing,done) }

=== Project Status Board ===
architect: architecture design COMPLETE

================================================================
         FINAL DESIGN DOCUMENT — Assembled by architect
================================================================

This document was produced by 3 cooperating agents:
  1. architect   — designed overall architecture (sequential)
  2. backend-dev — implemented backend spec     (parallel)
  3. frontend-dev— implemented frontend spec    (parallel)

All agents coordinated through Pluto locks and messaging.

--- Architecture Section (by architect) ---
See architecture.txt for full design.

--- Backend Section (by backend-dev) ---
See backend.txt for full implementation spec.

--- Frontend Section (by frontend-dev) ---
See frontend.txt for full implementation spec.

Assembly complete. All sections verified.
